positive: A vibrant, stylized celestial fox spirit (Kitsune) standing atop a stylized crescent moon. The fox has ethereal blue fur and glowing gold accents. It is surrounded by a swirling galaxy motif of cosmic dust, nebulas, and gentle stars. The style is minimalist, graphic tattoo art with strong, bold linework and solid color fields. Composition must be perfectly centered and suitable for screen printing on apparel. Use deep indigo, cosmic violet, electric blue, and pops of metallic gold leaf accents. High contrast, clean silhouette, symmetrical arrangement, flat graphic design feel, vector illustration quality, clean white background, perfect symmetry, trending on ArtStation, designed for T-shirt print.
